_description: Baseline eval set — one case per route. Drop additional *.json files in this folder and the runner picks them up automatically.

email.subject: Where is my order?
email.body: Hi, I ordered two tees last week (order BR-10231) and haven't seen them yet. When will they arrive?

email.subject: order status
email.body: Just checking on my hoodie order BR-10250, hasn't shipped yet?

email.subject: Return this mug
email.body: The mug from order BR-10199 is fine but I changed my mind. Can I return it for a refund?

email.subject: Refund please
email.body: My bottle (BR-10188) was delivered over 30 days ago but I want my money back. This is ridiculous.

email.subject: Never got my package
email.body: I never received my order and I want a full refund right now.

email.subject: Do these shrink?
email.body: Quick question before my tees arrive — are the Everyday Tees pre-shrunk?
